connect.title: Connect your ad accounts
connect.subtitle: Connect the platforms you advertise on.
connect.disconnectConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect?

intel.territoryNote: These geographic markets were identified from your strategy. Your campaign is already configured to target them.
intel.audienceNote: These are audience segments not yet covered by your active campaigns. Select one to add it to your targeting.
intel.audienceAddNote: These segments were identified based on your strategy and business profile. Add them to refine your campaign targeting.
intel.connectMetaCompetitor: Connect Meta to unlock competitor intelligence
intel.competitorNote: Uses Facebook Ad Library — shows all active ads in your market
intel.creativeElementNote: What's working — hook, CTA, color, length, tone

status.emergencyStopBody: This will immediately pause {count} active campaign(s) across all platforms. All advertising will stop.
status.budgetEffectImmediate: This will take effect immediately on your ad platform.
status.statusActive: Week {week} · {count} campaign(s) active · Vigmis is optimizing your campaigns.
status.statusLearning: Google is in the learning phase — performance improves as the algorithm collects data (typically 2 weeks).
status.statusNoActive: No active campaigns. Launch from the Campaigns tab.
status.statusSetup: Connect your ad accounts to get started.

empty.welcomeBody: Your campaigns are ready to launch. Once live, this screen will show real-time spend, ROAS, platform health, and AI actions. Have questions? Use the chat button in the bottom-right corner — I'm here 24/7.
empty.readyToLaunchBody: Vigmis analyzed your site and built a campaign plan. Click Launch to create your campaigns on Google, Meta, and TikTok.
empty.noAnalyticsBody: Data will appear once your campaigns are live and running. Launch campaigns from the Overview tab.
empty.noCampaignsBody: Go to the Overview tab and click "Launch Campaigns" to get started.
empty.noVideos: No videos generated yet — write a script above and click "Preview Brief →"
empty.noAudiencesBody: Click "Discover Audiences" to find profitable segments for your campaigns.
empty.noThemesBody: Click "Analyze Themes" to surface patterns across your published posts.
empty.noAudit: No audit has been run yet. Click Re-check to scan your landing page.
empty.noStrategy: No strategy saved yet. Complete onboarding to build one.
empty.noOptimizationChanges: No optimization changes yet — campaigns are still in their learning period or have not run optimization cycles.
empty.noAssets: No assets yet. Upload images or videos to build your library.
empty.noHistory: No history yet — data accumulates month by month.
empty.noImages: No images in library yet. Upload from computer to add.
empty.noPosts: No posts yet. Click "Generate this week's posts" to create content.

overview.disclaimerText: Vigmis is an AI marketing manager that continuously analyzes, optimizes, and adjusts your campaigns. As with all digital advertising, results cannot be predicted — they depend on market conditions, seasonality, competitor activity, and platform algorithms beyond our control. Vigmis operates on a best-effort basis and does not guarantee specific outcomes. You retain full control and can pause or modify your campaigns at any time.
overview.aiVisibilityDesc: How AI systems find your business
overview.installPixel: Install tracking pixel to see real conversion data
overview.noTrackingWarning: Without tracking, you're relying on what the ad platforms tell you — which is often 2–3× inflated due to multi-platform attribution.
overview.generateSocialDesc: Create this week's Facebook & Instagram content
overview.createCreativeDesc: Generate an image or video ad for your campaigns

analytics.simulatedDesc: projections based on your budget. Real ROAS/CPA will appear once Google and Meta API access is approved.

creative.aiRecsSubtitle: Ready-to-use concepts built from your strategy analysis
creative.noStrategyTitle: Run your strategy analysis to unlock AI creative concepts
creative.noStrategyBody: Go to the Strategy tab and click "Run Analysis" — this takes about 5 minutes and powers all AI recommendations.
creative.videoProductionSubtitle: AI generates your ad video — 1 free revision included
creative.step2: Step 2: Write your script or description
creative.writeScriptHint: Write a script above to continue
creative.policyRevision: · 1 free revision included — request it from the job list after delivery
creative.videoStarted: Video generation started — check the job list below for status. You'll receive your video in 3–5 minutes.
creative.previewApprove: Preview — approve before you are charged
creative.metaPolicy: Meta policy: When uploading to Ads Manager, check the "AI-generated content" box. Required for all AI-generated images and videos.
creative.scoringSubtitle: Get a 0-100 score and improvement tips before you spend

intelligence.noAudit: No audit yet. Click Re-audit to run one.
intelligence.miningThemes: Mining recurring themes from your comments…
intelligence.noInsights: No recurring patterns yet. Vigmis needs more comment volume to surface insights.
intelligence.crisisDesc: Vigmis tracks your daily comment sentiment against a 7-day baseline. If negative comments spike beyond 2.5σ, you get a critical alert.
intelligence.noStrategy: No strategy analysis yet — click Run Analysis to generate your first weekly briefing.

protocols.title: Decision Protocols
protocols.subtitle: Every Vigmis recommendation, documented with full conversation and audit trail.
protocols.selectPrompt: Select a protocol from the list to view the full recommendation and discussion
protocols.expiresWarning: ⚠ Expires in {hours}h — approve or reject now or this decision will be skipped.
protocols.replyPlaceholder: Ask a question or share your thoughts...
protocols.protocolBody: When Vigmis takes an action on your behalf — pausing a campaign, shifting budget, concluding an A/B test — it documents every decision here with full reasoning.

strategy.title: Current Strategy
strategy.subtitle: What Vigmis is doing, why, and every change since launch.
strategy.websiteTitle: What Vigmis understood about your business
strategy.noWebsiteAnalysis: No website analysis was stored. Click "Re-analyze website" to scan now — Vigmis will refuse to invent if the site is unreadable.
strategy.confidenceNote: Green dot = high confidence, amber = medium confidence
strategy.customBenchmarks: Custom benchmarks (what counts as good vs bad for this business)
strategy.budgetScenariosSubtitle: What-if forecasts based on your ROAS history
strategy.reanalyzeFailed: Re-analysis failed. Try again from the chat.
strategy.reanalyzeSuccess: Re-analyzed. Reload to see the new strategy.

settings.title: Campaign Settings
settings.optimizationSubtitle: Control how the AI manages your campaigns
settings.manualModeWarning: Important: manual mode has a cost
settings.manualModeBody: When Vigmis detects a needed change (e.g. a campaign is burning budget with low results), it will create a pending protocol and wait for your approval. Until you approve, the campaign continues at current settings.
settings.manualModeNote: This works well if you log in daily. If you're less available, Auto mode gives better results — every action is still logged and you can see the full audit trail at any time.
settings.alertChannelsSubtitle: Get notified via email or WhatsApp when campaigns need attention
settings.whatsappError: Must start with + and country code (e.g. +972501234567)
settings.dangerZoneSubtitle: These actions are irreversible. Please read carefully before proceeding.
settings.exportDataDesc: Download all your campaign data, settings, and history as JSON.
settings.cancelSubscriptionDesc: Manage or cancel your billing plan. Your account and data stay intact.
settings.deleteAccountDesc: All campaigns are paused and your account is permanently deleted immediately. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteModalBody: All campaigns will be paused immediately. Your account data will be permanently and irreversibly deleted. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteModalDownload: Consider {link} before deleting — campaigns, settings, and history as JSON.
settings.optionManualDesc: Vigmis sends you a decision protocol for each change. Campaign runs unchanged until you approve. Recommended only if you check the dashboard daily.
settings.optionAutoDesc: Vigmis applies safe, data-driven optimizations automatically. Every action is documented and you can review the full log anytime.
settings.optionAggressiveDesc: Vigmis moves faster — larger budget swings, quicker scaling decisions. Higher upside potential with higher variance.
settings.manualModeSaved: Manual mode saved — changes need your approval.
settings.testEnableFirst: Enable at least one channel before sending a test.

history.title: Account History
history.subtitle: Monthly snapshots of your account — performance, AI visibility, and all actions Vigmis took

social.title: Social Media
social.enableBody: Vigmis will create weekly content for your Facebook Page and Instagram. You approve before anything is published.
social.enableNote: Requires Meta connection. You can disable it later in settings.
social.skippedBanner: {count} platform skipped — already scheduled this week.
social.skippedBannerPlural: {count} platforms skipped — already scheduled this week.
social.fbIgOnly: Publishing to Facebook & Instagram. Connect Google Ads to manage paid campaigns too.
social.coolingOffNote: High-stakes content auto-publishes after 1 hour. Cancel here if you change your mind.
social.failedGenBody: Vigmis could not find enough information about your business to generate posts.
social.failedGenNote: Delete these and click "Generate this week's posts" again after making sure your website has product/service details.
social.pickFromLibrary: Or pick from your brand library:
social.connectionsSubtitle: Vigmis will manage your campaigns and posts through these connections.
social.fbIgDesc: One click opens Facebook. On their screen you'll approve all the permissions Vigmis needs at once — and you're done.
social.noPagesFound: Facebook returned no Pages. You need admin access to at least one Page.
social.noAdAccountsFound: Facebook returned no Ad Accounts. Make sure you have admin access to at least one.
social.ga4Desc: Connecting Analytics lets Vigmis judge campaigns on real on-site conversions instead of platform-reported numbers.
social.ga4Synced: Vigmis measures campaign results from your website instead of relying on Facebook and Google's own reports.
social.noGa4Found: No Analytics properties found on this Google account. Create one at analytics.google.com and try again.
social.googleAdsDesc: Connect your Google Ads account. After connecting, you'll choose which ad account Vigmis should manage.
social.noGoogleAccounts: No Google Ads accounts found. Make sure you have access to at least one account at ads.google.com.
social.accountStatus: Account status: {status} — activate it in Google Ads before using with Vigmis.
social.postActionsRemoveConfirm: Remove this post from Vigmis? (it stays live on Facebook/Instagram unless you delete it there too)
social.postActionsImageNote: Paste a public image URL. Image upload is coming — for now use a URL from your site or any image host.
social.reconnectModalBody: Your Facebook connection needs to be refreshed to publish posts.

connect.title: Connect your ad accounts
connect.subtitle: Connect the platforms you advertise on. You can always add more later — but connecting now means a better strategy from day one.
connect.tiktokDesc: TikTok for Business — In-Feed, Spark, TopView
connect.chooseAccount: Choose which Google Ads account Vigmis should manage:
connect.noAccounts: No Google Ads accounts found. Make sure you have an active account at ads.google.com.
connect.metaHelp: then come back and connect. Need help? Use the chat button below.
connect.tiktokComingSoon: TikTok Ads integration is coming soon — connect Google or Meta for now.
connect.createTikTok: Create a TikTok for Business account →
connect.tiktokHelp: then come back and connect. Need help? Use the chat button below.
connect.termsLabel: By continuing, I agree to Vigmis's Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and Acceptable Use Policy (including the AI system limitations described therein). I confirm I am 18 or older.
connect.marketingOptIn: Send me tips and product updates by email. (Optional)
connect.parallelCampaigns: I have active campaigns on these platforms that I am not transferring to Vigmis. (Helps calibrate benchmarks.)
connect.continueZero: Connect at least one platform to continue
connect.sessionError: Session error — please refresh the page

oauthErrors.google_failed: Google connection failed — please try again
oauthErrors.meta_failed: Meta connection failed — please try again
oauthErrors.tiktok_failed: TikTok connection failed — please try again
oauthErrors.tiktok_not_configured: TikTok integration is not yet active — coming soon

analysis.takes: This takes a few minutes. A thorough analysis is worth the wait ☕
analysis.researchingMarket: Researching competitors, market trends, and benchmarks...

websiteCheck.title: Let's make sure we understand your business
websiteCheck.subtitle: Vigmis scanned your website. Here's what we understood — please confirm or add details.
websiteCheck.understood: What Vigmis understood from your website
websiteCheck.notEnough: We couldn't extract enough information from your website to build a confident strategy.
websiteCheck.answersPlaceholder: Answer the questions above — this helps Vigmis build a better strategy...
websiteCheck.addPlaceholder: e.g. Our hero product is the Premium plan. We target small business owners, not individuals...

websiteDescribe.title: Tell us about your business
websiteDescribe.subtitle: We couldn't automatically read your website. This is common with modern platforms like Shopify, Wix, or custom-built sites — it doesn't mean anything is wrong with your site. Just tell us about your business below and we'll create your strategy from your description.
websiteDescribe.vigmisNote: It looks like you entered the Vigmis website. Please enter your own business website instead.
websiteDescribe.label: What does your business do? Who is your target customer?
websiteDescribe.placeholder: e.g. We sell AI-powered marketing software for small e-commerce businesses. Our customers are online store owners who want to automate their ad campaigns...

strategy.basedOn: Based on your website analysis and market research
strategy.creativeBriefSub: What creatives Vigmis will produce for each platform
strategy.recPlatforms: Vigmis recommends adding these platforms based on your business profile:
strategy.organicSub: Organic channels reduce ad dependency over time and improve campaign quality scores.
strategy.whatToChange: What would you like to change?
strategy.vigmisOpinion: Vigmis will share its honest opinion before updating the plan.
strategy.discussError: Couldn't get a response right now. You can proceed with your changes or approve the current plan.
strategy.feedbackPlaceholder: e.g. I want to include TikTok, or I'd prefer a lower budget, or focus only on Google Search...
strategy.timelineDay1: Days 1–7: Learning phase — Vigmis collects data before making budget changes. Alerts are active from day 1.
strategy.timelineDay8: Day 8+: Full optimization begins — budget adjustments, creative refresh, targeting review.
strategy.beforeApproveDesc: This is the right moment. Want to change the budget, adjust platforms, tweak the targeting, or push back on any part of the plan? Don't approve if anything feels off.
strategy.askPlaceholder: e.g. Lower the budget, remove Google, focus only on Israel...
strategy.approveConfirm: I confirm that I have reviewed this campaign plan in full. The budget of {budget}/month is my informed decision, made after reviewing Vigmis's analysis and recommendations. I understand that projected outcomes (clicks, leads, conversions) are estimates based on market benchmarks, not guarantees.

creative.title: Creative Assets
creative.subtitle: Your campaign needs visual ads to run. Choose how you want to handle creative.
creative.aiRecText: A talking avatar video builds trust quickly — it works especially well on TikTok and Meta for service businesses.
creative.ownCreativeDesc: Upload images or videos from the dashboard after setup
creative.canChange: You can always add or change creative assets from the dashboard
creative.avatarDesc: A realistic spokesperson presents your business

tracking.title: Install your tracking pixel
tracking.subtitle: Vigmis measures your actual business results, not just what the ad platforms claim. Without this, you only see platform ROAS — which is often 2–3× inflated.
tracking.whyText: Ad platforms like Meta and Google each claim credit for the same sale. The result: your reported ROAS is artificially inflated by 30–200%. Vigmis measures what actually happened on your website — the real number.
tracking.step1: Step 1 — Paste this on every page of your website
tracking.pixelFiring: Pixel is firing correctly. Vigmis is now tracking real conversions on your website.
tracking.afterPasting: After pasting the snippet, visit your website and come back here to verify it's working.
tracking.shopifyDesc: Direct order data = more accurate True ROAS than pixel alone
tracking.shopifyDetails: Connect your Shopify store so Vigmis receives actual order data with exact revenue per campaign — the gold standard for attribution.
tracking.wooCommerce: WooCommerce, Wix, and custom integrations coming soon.
tracking.installLater: You can always install tracking later from the dashboard — campaigns will start even without it.

metaAssets.title: Choose what Vigmis will manage
metaAssets.subtitle: Pick one Facebook Page and one Ad Account. Instagram is optional — only used if your Page has a linked Instagram Business account. You can change all of this later in Dashboard → Social → Connect.
metaAssets.instagramNote: If the Page has a linked Instagram Business account, it'll be used automatically. If not — Vigmis will only publish to Facebook.
metaAssets.noPages: No Pages found. You can continue without one — Meta Ads will still work. To enable social publishing, add a Facebook Page from Dashboard → Social → Connect.
metaAssets.noAdAccounts: Meta returned no Ad Accounts. You need admin access to at least one Ad Account in Business Manager.
metaAssets.changeNote: You can change these selections anytime in Dashboard → Social → Connect.

rethink.title: Rethink your strategy?
rethink.subtitle: This will restart the interview and build a new campaign plan from scratch.
rethink.warning: Your current plan will be replaced.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This cannot be undone.

billing.title: Billing
billing.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel?

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to view this page.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

chat.emptyBody: Campaigns, budgets, posts — I can answer and act.
